content.text: Let me do a final review of all the changed files to make sure everything is consistent:

Everything looks correct. Here's a complete summary of every change made:

---

## GitHub OAuth — Changes Made

### 1. `template/addons/next-auth/api-handler.ts` *(JWT strategy — no Prisma)*
- Swapped `DiscordProvider` → `GitHubProvider` with `GITHUB_CLIENT_ID` / `GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET`
- Added a `jwt` callback that captures `profile.login` (GitHub username) into the token on first sign-in
- Updated `session` callback to forward `username` from the JWT token onto `session.user`

### 2. `template/addons/next-auth/api-handler-prisma.ts` *(database strategy — with Prisma)*
- Swapped `DiscordProvider` → `GitHubProvider`
- Added a `profile()` override that maps `profile.login` → `username` and `profile.avatar_url` → `image` when creating/updating the Prisma `User` row
- Updated `session` callback to pull `username` off the `user` (Prisma record) and put it on `session.user`

### 3. `template/addons/env/auth-schema.mjs` & `auth-prisma-schema.mjs`
- Replaced `DISCORD_CLIENT_ID` / `DISCORD_CLIENT_SECRET` with `GITHUB_CLIENT_ID` / `GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET` in the Zod server schema

### 4. `template/addons/prisma/auth-schema.prisma`
- Added `username String?` to the `User` model so the GitHub login is persisted alongside `name`, `email`, and `image`

### 5. `template/base/.env-example`
- Replaced the Discord section with a GitHub section including a comment pointing to `github.com/settings/developers`

### 6. `template/addons/next-auth/next-auth.d.ts`
- Extended the `Session.user` interface with `username?: string | null` so the field is fully typed everywhere `useSession` / `getServerSession` is used

### 7. `template/addons/next-auth/github-sign-in-button.tsx` *(new file)*
- Reusable `<GitHubSignInButton>` component using `signIn("github")` / `signOut()` and `useSession`

### 8. `template/addons/trpc/protected-example-router.ts`
- Added `auth.getProfile` query that returns `{ id, name, email, image, username }` from `ctx.session.user`, demonstrating that GitHub session data flows correctly through the tRPC context

### 9. `template/page-studs/profile/` *(3 new page stubs)*
| File | When generated |
|------|----------------|
| `with-auth.tsx` | Auth only |
| `with-auth-trpc.tsx` | Auth + tRPC |
| `with-auth-trpc-tw.tsx` | Auth + tRPC + Tailwind |

Each page guards the route (redirects to `/` if unauthenticated), displays the GitHub avatar (`next/image`), name, `@username` (with link in the Tailwind variant), email, and the tRPC variants also call `auth.getProfile` to show the session ID from the server context.

### 10. `src/helpers/selectBoilerplate.ts` + `src/helpers/createProject.ts`
- Added `selectProfileFile` function that picks the right profile stub based on the installed packages
- Wired it into `createProject` alongside the existing `selectAppFile` / `selectIndexFile` calls
